curation_notes: Locations derived directly from the patch diff. All three files contain the same vulnerability pattern: the scan result check only inspects infected_files count but ignores scan_err, allowing files that cause scan errors (e.g., InvalidMagicError in picklescan) to bypass the security check and be loaded via torch.load. Additionally, read_checkpoint_meta had scanning disabled by default (scan=False). The pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization (CWE-502) is correct since the core issue is unsafe pickle deserialization of untrusted model files with a bypassable safety scanner.
